brand.name: BLACK KITCHEN CAR YUME
brand.tagline: First you see it. Then you fall for it.
brand.lede: A parfait-only kitchen car roaming Joetsu & Myoko. Cream that isn't too sweet — made for kids and grown-ups alike.

home.aboutExcerpt:
A black kitchen car, a cream that isn't too sweet.
A simple, slightly special parfait — the kind you fall for on your own terms.
home.feedLede: Follow us on Instagram for next stops and new parfaits.

menu.title: Menu
menu.lede: ¥800–¥1,000. The lineup shifts with the season and where we're parked.
menu.note: * Prices and lineup may vary by venue. Check Instagram for the latest.

schedule.title: Where to find us
schedule.lede: Our next stops are announced on Instagram as they're booked.

about.title: About YUME
about.storyBody:
"A little dream-like plate, inside an ordinary day."
That's the feeling behind the name. (Full story coming soon, straight from the owner.)
about.creamBody: We dial the sweetness down so the ingredients lead. Light enough for kids, satisfying down to the last bite for everyone else.
about.ownerBody: If you spot us at a market in Joetsu or Myoko, come say hi.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lede: Event bookings, press, and everything else — Instagram DM is the fastest way to reach us.
contact.responseNote: The owner usually replies within 24 hours.
contact.eventRequestBody: We're happy to bring the cart to markets and events. DM us with date, venue, expected footfall, and any details.

nextEvent.label: Next stop
nextEvent.empty: The next stop is being booked. Check Instagram for updates.

instagramFallbackNote: * Auto-feed will activate once the Behold.so connection is wired up.
